### Post by arushad on 2009-07-11

i'm trying to install vga driver, but i don't know how to, please anyone can help me with this. My system is Acer Aspire M1610, VGA is SIS672,
i've downloaded drivers from sis.com .tgz file and extracted it, it gives an output file

sis_drv.la and sis_drv.so

when i open this sis_drv.la it gives an output of
----------------------------------------------------------
# sis_drv.la - a libtool library file

# The name of the static archive.

shouldnotlink=yes
